# Local Business Search - llms.txt
# AI-Driven Business Systems for Local Companies

## Company Information

- Name: Local Business Search
- Tagline: AI. Business Process.
- Description: We build intelligent AI-driven business systems that improve how local companies operate—from lead generation to financial visibility to automated operations.
- Address: 23343 Colina Way, Charlotte Harbor, FL 33980
- Phone: +1-618-741-6143
- Email: jed@powerofadvertising.com
- Website: https://localbusinesssearch.com

## Services

### AI-Driven Business Systems
Transform your business operations with custom AI automation that connects your existing tools, eliminates manual data entry, and provides real visibility into what's working.

### Business Operations Optimization
Streamline your operations with systems that actually work together. We connect your CRM, dispatch software, accounting, and marketing tools into one cohesive system.

### Digital Advertising Management
Strategic paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads, Facebook, and other platforms with real tracking of ROI and profitability—not just clicks and leads.

## Industries We Serve

- Home Services (Plumbing, HVAC, Electrical, Roofing, Landscaping)
- Local Retail
- Professional Services (Legal, Medical, Dental)
- Franchises
- Municipalities

## Key Differentiators

- We don't replace your existing software—we connect it and build what's missing
- Focus on profitability, not just revenue
- Real automation, not just marketing hype
- Understanding of local business operations
- Strategic systems, not just tools

## Resources

### Blog Topics
- AI automation for local businesses
- Business systems integration
- Marketing tech stack optimization
- Home services operations
- CRM and dispatch software challenges
- Real profitability tracking

## Social Media

- Twitter/X: @Jed_X_Wilson

## Target Audience

Local business owners and operators who are:
- Frustrated with disconnected software
- Drowning in manual data entry
- Unable to track real marketing ROI
- Missing leads and follow-ups
- Spending too much time on admin work
- Looking to scale without operational chaos

## Core Message

Your business doesn't need more apps. It needs systems that actually talk to each other.

Most local businesses are paying $700-1,500/month for software that doesn't work together, forcing them to become data entry operations instead of focusing on what they do best.

We build intelligent systems that connect what you have, automate what can be automated, and give you real visibility into what's working and what's not.

## Latest Content

Blog: https://localbusinesssearch.com/blog/
- "We Just Built This Entire Website in 12 Hours Using AI"
- "Your Plumbing Business Doesn't Need More Apps—It Needs Systems That Actually Talk to Each Other"
- "Your HVAC Business Is Buried in Software—And It's Costing You More Than Just Monthly Fees"

## Technology Approach

- Integration-first (not replacement)
- API connections between existing tools
- Custom automation where needed
- Real-time data synchronization
- Single source of truth
- Profitability-focused analytics

## Business Philosophy

- Empathy for operators (not just business owners)
- Realistic about software limitations
- No product pitches, real solutions
- Understanding of seasonal pressures
- Commercial and residential experience
- Outcomes over tools
